n: Chapter 6: Goblins in the Western Halls

steps.t: Goblins can be found among the Silvertine Lodes, south and below the Great Delving, and their maps can be found within Gamil Filik, the mine they have…
Brogur is in the Chamber of Command, up the eastern stairs in the Chamber of the Cross-roads, located at the southern entrance to Durin's Way, north o…
Bósi is in the Chamber of the Cross-roads, just outside the Chamber of Command. Brogur has not seen anything of use on the crude goblin-maps you found…
